---
image: img.jpg
title: 'The determinants of post-acquisition growth in entrepreneurial start-ups:
  Evidence from India'
author: Anish Tiwari, Teresa Hogan, and Damien Dupré
description: Entrepreneurial Finance Conference (ENTFIN 2021)
date: '2021-06-25'
about:
  id: hero-heading
  template: jolla
  image-shape: rounded
---

::: {#hero-heading}

Entrepreneurial Finance Conference (ENTFIN 2021)

:::
